svg.title: IKARY autonomous development loop
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the full loop from GitHub issue creation through planning, implementation, review, and merge

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I write a good IKARY GitHub issue?')
sendPrompt('Show me the @claude plan fix workflow file')
sendPrompt('How does plan iteration work with @claude revise?')
sendPrompt('What does @claude do feature trigger exactly?')
g.text: Reads CLAUDE-ACTIONS block → codes → opens PR

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the CI workflow check for IKARY?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Codex or Copilot as a PR reviewer?')
sendPrompt('How does Claude auto-respond to PR review comments?')

svg.text: loop until CI green + no unresolved comments

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Should auto-merge be enabled or require human approval?')
sendPrompt('What does CLAUDE.md need to say for auto-merge to be safe?')
